allow: Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command 'Get-PnpDevice -PresentOnly | Where-Object { $_.Class -in '\\''USB'\\'','\\''AndroidUsbDeviceClass'\\'','\\''Ports'\\'','\\''Portable Devices'\\'' -or $_.FriendlyName -match '\\''Android|ADB|Tablet|平板|MTP|Composite'\\'' } | Select-Object Status,Class,FriendlyName | Format-Table -AutoSize')
